message:
feat(robot): add impact, file-relations, and related-work exploration surfaces

Implements --robot-impact, --robot-file-relations, and --robot-related
commands with full dispatch in main.rs. Cleans up unused imports in
file_intel.rs. All 15 file_intel unit tests and 31 schema validation
tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -242,6 +242,24 @@ pub struct Cli {
     #[arg(long, default_value_t = 10)]
     pub hotspots_limit: usize,
 
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub robot_impact: Option<String>,
+
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub robot_file_relations: Option<String>,
+
+    #[arg(long, default_value_t = 0.5)]
+    pub relations_threshold: f64,
+
+    #[arg(long, default_value_t = 10)]
+    pub relations_limit: usize,
+
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub robot_related: Option<String>,
+
+    #[arg(long, default_value_t = 10)]
+    pub related_limit: usize,
+
     #[arg(long)]
     pub export_md: Option<PathBuf>,
 
@@ -296,5 +314,8 @@ impl Cli {
             || self.robot_orphans
             || self.robot_file_beads.is_some()
             || self.robot_file_hotspots
+            || self.robot_impact.is_some()
+            || self.robot_file_relations.is_some()
+            || self.robot_related.is_some()
     }
 }
